seed

seed seed-token

The string seed-token may be any (whitespace-delimited) string. The string is hashed to obtain a number with which the random number generator is initialized.

Some obvious choices of seed string might be the date, the time, or the index of a simulation run. If the seed command is not used, Moleculizer seeds the random number generator with a compiled-in number, so that successive runs of the same simulation are the same.
